message:
fix(freeze): fix CV ownership for argv and call results

Two memory safety bugs were causing heap corruption (SIGSEGV) in complex
frozen code like TSC:

1. get_arg* was converting argv to CV without duping. Since CV values
   can be freed later, this was a use-after-free when the original
   argv was still owned by the caller.

2. Call results weren't duped before freeing args. If a function returns
   one of its arguments, freeing the arg also frees the result.

Fixes:
- Add JSValue.dup() for all argv → CV conversions
- Add JSValue.dup() for call results before freeing args/func

This fixes TSC standalone crash (2667 frozen functions).
